name: audit-pack-emit exits non-zero and rejects a format value that is not one of json markdown html tarball per §2.24
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format pdf --commit-sha abc --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
